data: Asking for Permission or Time Off
Asking for Permission or Time Off
Revise how to ask for permission or time off at work

message: Let's revise how to ask for permission or time off professionally.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"I would like to request [leave/permission] because [reason]."

Giving a clear reason makes your request sound professional and helps your manager decide quickly.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/93a1dada-f9a2-409b-82f8-4f08879d8e28-50.-Asking-for-Permission-or-Time-Off.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/93a1dada-f9a2-409b-82f8-4f08879d8e28-50.-Asking-for-Permission-or-Time-Off.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to request emergency leave

1.Something came up at home so I cannot come to work today.
2.I would like to request casual leave because I am not feeling well today.

Correct answer: 2

Select the correct way to request study leave

1.I would like to request study leave because I have an important examination coming up.
2.I need to take leave for a few days because I have an exam and I need to study.

Correct answer: 1
I&&would&&like&&to&&request casual&&leave because I&&am not&&feeling&&well today.
I&&would&&like&&to&&request permission&&to&&come&&in late because my&&commute is&&disrupted.
I&&would&&like&&to&&request three&&days&&of&&leave because I&&need&&to&&travel for&&a&&family matter.
I&&would&&like&&to&&request flexi-time because I&&have&&a doctor's&&appointment in&&the&&morning.
I&&would&&like&&to&&request an&&extra&&day&&off because I&&need to&&complete&&my passport&&renewal.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. You are not feeling well and need to take a sick day. How do you request leave from your manager?'

'2. You have a government appointment and need to leave early. How do you ask for permission?'

'3. You want to attend an industry event during work hours. How do you request permission?'

'4. You need to travel for a family emergency. How do you request emergency leave?'

'5. You worked extra hours last month and want a compensatory day off. How do you request it?'"
